# Docs for agents

Learn how AI agents and LLMs consume Cloudflare documentation

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/docs-for-agents/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Docs for agents documentation pages

- [Docs for agents](https://developers.cloudflare.com/docs-for-agents/index.md): Connect AI agents and LLMs to Cloudflare docs
